hypothesis: If the six process parameters—bicarbonate temperature, bicarbonate concentration, flow rate 1 (30–200 mL/min), flow rate 2 (6–30 mL/min), KOH concentration, and total applied current density—are optimized via closed-loop Bayesian optimization with Gaussian process regression in the AdaCarbon platform, then the resulting reactor yield of the reactive carbon electrolyzer will be higher than that obtained by random experimentation because the Bayesian model efficiently captures nonlinear parameter interactions and guides experiment selection.
